text:
That's 5c4bb:

        ops->fini_native(&ctx, zcp);
   5c4bb:       4c 89 ef                mov    %r13,%rdi
   5c4be:       4c 8b 6c 24 38          mov    0x38(%rsp),%r13
   5c4c3:       4c 89 ee                mov    %r13,%rsi
   5c4c6:       41 ff 56 08             callq  *0x8(%r14)
